sections.mainDescription: Automate HR processes, track attendance, and support employees with self-service tools. Build a productive and engaged team with smart HR management.

content.title: Recruitment

content.description: Monitor employee hours and absences with real-time data. Automate attendance logs, flag irregularities, and integrate with payroll for accurate compensation.

content.title: Self-Service Portal
content.description: Enable employees to manage their own data, request leave, and update personal information. Empower staff with easy access to HR resources.

sections.author: InnoX Team

faqs.question: Can InnoX HRM be customized?
faqs.answer: Yes. InnoX HRM is fully customizable to match your organizational structure. Whether you're managing a small team or a complex multi-department organization, the platform lets you define workflows, access rights, and automation rules tailored to your needs—without the need for custom development.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes. We offer a 14-day free trial of InnoX HRM with full access to all core features. No credit card is required to sign up. You can explore onboarding, employee records, leave management, and more before committing to a paid plan.

faqs.question: Can I integrate with existing payroll systems?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. InnoX HRM supports seamless integrations with a wide range of payroll systems including third-party APIs and custom exports. Whether you're using local payroll services or cloud-based providers, our platform ensures accurate and automated data flow for payslips and compliance.
